meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Deployment
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment bottlenecks. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality client apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is a workflow bottleneck, not a technical dead-end. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you standardize your environment, automate CI/CD pipelines, and eliminate configuration drift. Pair this with Claude Code to generate deployment-ready infrastructure, ensuring your client projects move from local development to production in minutes, not days.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is expecting a live link, but your terminal is a graveyard of cryptic error messages and 'it works on my machine' excuses. Deployment shouldn't be a high-stakes guessing game; it should be the most boring part of your day.

We’ve engineered the Antigravity project template to serve as the ultimate deployment harness. By abstracting the complexity of infrastructure-as-code, we allow you to focus on shipping features that convert, while the automation handles the heavy lifting of production readiness.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure all necessary deployment hooks are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard scaffold for a full-stack SaaS application, ensuring all CI/CD configuration files are included.

steps.title: Configure Environment Variables
steps.description: Securely map your production secrets without risking exposure in your repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure .env.example file and a template for environment variable injection compatible with the Antigravity deployment engine.

steps.title: Automate Infrastructure Provisioning
steps.description: Use Claude Code to define the cloud infrastructure requirements based on your app's specific needs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory and generate the necessary Terraform or Pulumi scripts to provision the cloud infrastructure defined in the Antigravity template.

steps.title: Establish Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Link your repository to your hosting provider using the pre-built Antigravity pipeline scripts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on merge to main, running tests and deploying the containerized app via Antigravity pipelines.

steps.title: Final Sanity Check and Push
steps.description: Validate the configuration against production standards before the final push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for common deployment pitfalls and verify that the Antigravity manifest matches the current production requirements.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated staging environment that mirrors production exactly to catch configuration drifts before they hit your client's live app.
Tag your container images with git hashes instead of 'latest' to ensure you can perform a zero-downtime rollback in under 30 seconds.
Implement 'Health Checks' in your Antigravity manifest; a deployment that doesn't self-test is an accident waiting to happen.
Use Claude Code to document your infrastructure as you build it, so your client has a professional README generated automatically.
Keep your secrets out of the repo by using an external vault provider, even for small freelance projects; it builds immense trust with clients.
content.next_steps: Once your deployment pipeline is active, set up automated monitoring alerts so you are the first to know if a service goes down, keeping your client relationship professional and proactive.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the terminal and start shipping value that keeps clients coming back. With Antigravity and Claude Code, you have the leverage to scale your freelance business without the deployment headache. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
